title: 提取 ExternalApp/TerminalPreset + isSafeExternalUrl 到 src/shared 跨层契约层
description: ISS-009/REV2-001 + ISS-010/011 的 shared 层前置：renderer 6 处 @main/lib/local-db 违反 renderer→main 依赖方向。提取 ExternalApp（含 EXTERNAL_APPS const + NON_EDITOR_APPS）、TerminalPreset（含 ExecutionMode 依赖）到 src/shared/external-app-types.ts；提取 isSafeExternalUrl/externalUrlLogLabel 到 src/shared/safe-url/（逻辑从 main/lib/safe-url/scheme.ts 搬移）。renderer 与 main 均从 shared 导入；local-db 从 shared re-export 保持向后兼容；main/lib/safe-url 从 shared re-export 保持向后兼容。
action: 1) 创建 apps/desktop/src/shared/external-app-types.ts：搬移 EXTERNAL_APPS const (line 145-172) + ExternalApp type (line 174) + NON_EDITOR_APPS (line 176-182) + EXECUTION_MODES/ExecutionMode (line 243-250) + TerminalPreset interface (line 275-287) 从 local-db/index.ts。2) 创建 apps/desktop/src/shared/safe-url/index.ts + scheme.ts：搬移 ALLOWED_SCHEMES + isSafeExternalUrl + externalUrlLogLabel 从 main/lib/safe-url/scheme.ts。3) local-db/index.ts 改为 re-export：`export { EXTERNAL_APPS, NON_EDITOR_APPS } from 'shared/external-app-types'; export type { ExternalApp, ExecutionMode, TerminalPreset } from 'shared/external-app-types';`。4) main/lib/safe-url/scheme.ts 改为 re-export shim（不删除，保持 ./scheme import 链不断裂）：`export { isSafeExternalUrl, externalUrlLogLabel } from 'shared/safe-url';`，使 safe-url.test.ts 的 `from './scheme'` import 仍可用。5) 6 个 renderer 消费者改为 `import type { ExternalApp, TerminalPreset } from 'shared/external-app-types'`：commandPalette/core/types.ts, commandPalette/modules/openIn/commands.ts, components/OpenInButton/OpenInButton.tsx, components/OpenInExternalDropdown/{constants,OpenInExternalDropdownItems}.tsx, lib/agent-session-orchestrator/types.ts。保持 main 侧消费者零改动（仍从 local-db/safe-url 导入）。

criteria: grep 'export.*EXTERNAL_APPS.*from.*shared/external-app-types' apps/desktop/src/main/lib/local-db/index.ts 命中（re-export 向后兼容）
grep 'export.*isSafeExternalUrl.*from.*shared/safe-url' apps/desktop/src/main/lib/safe-url/scheme.ts 命中（re-export shim 保持 ./scheme import 链）
cd apps/desktop && bun run typecheck exits 0
convergence.verification: cd apps/desktop && bun run typecheck && grep -rl 'from "shared/external-app-types"' apps/desktop/src/renderer/ | wc -l （应 >= 6：commandPalette/core/types.ts, commandPalette/modules/openIn/commands.ts, components/OpenInButton/OpenInButton.tsx, components/OpenInExternalDropdown/{constants,OpenInExternalDropdownItems}.tsx, lib/agent-session-orchestrator/types.ts）
convergence.definition_of_done: ExternalApp/TerminalPreset/isSafeExternalUrl 位于 src/shared 跨层契约层，renderer 不再 import main 路径，main 侧消费者零改动，typecheck 通过。

files.change: 新建文件，搬移 EXTERNAL_APPS const + ExternalApp type + NON_EDITOR_APPS + EXECUTION_MODES/ExecutionMode + TerminalPreset interface
搬移 ALLOWED_SCHEMES + isSafeExternalUrl + externalUrlLogLabel 从 main/lib/safe-url/scheme.ts

删除 EXTERNAL_APPS/ExternalApp/NON_EDITOR_APPS/EXECUTION_MODES/ExecutionMode/TerminalPreset 定义，改为 `export { EXTERNAL_APPS, NON_EDITOR_APPS } from 'shared/external-app-types'; export type { ExternalApp, ExecutionMode, TerminalPreset } from 'shared/external-app-types';`
改为 re-export shim（不删除文件，保持 safe-url.test.ts 的 `from './scheme'` import 链不断裂）：`export { isSafeExternalUrl, externalUrlLogLabel } from 'shared/safe-url';`

implementation: 创建 apps/desktop/src/shared/external-app-types.ts，从 local-db/index.ts 搬移 EXTERNAL_APPS const (line 145-172 'as const' 数组) + ExternalApp type (line 174 `type ExternalApp = (typeof EXTERNAL_APPS)[number]`) + NON_EDITOR_APPS (line 176-182) + EXECUTION_MODES (line 243-248) + ExecutionMode (line 250) + TerminalPreset interface (line 275-287)
创建 apps/desktop/src/shared/safe-url/scheme.ts，搬移 ALLOWED_SCHEMES Set(['http:','https:','mailto:']) + isSafeExternalUrl(url:string):boolean + externalUrlLogLabel(url:string):string

修改 local-db/index.ts：删除搬移的定义，加 `export { EXTERNAL_APPS, NON_EDITOR_APPS, EXECUTION_MODES } from 'shared/external-app-types'; export type { ExternalApp, ExecutionMode, TerminalPreset } from 'shared/external-app-types';`

修改 main/lib/safe-url/scheme.ts：改为 re-export shim（不删除文件）：`export { isSafeExternalUrl, externalUrlLogLabel } from 'shared/safe-url';`，保持 main/lib/safe-url/index.ts 的 `from './scheme'` re-export 链与 safe-url.test.ts 的 `from './scheme'` import 链均不断裂

修改 6 个 renderer 消费者：将 `import ... from '@main/lib/local-db'` 改为 `from 'shared/external-app-types'`（仅 ExternalApp/TerminalPreset/EXTERNAL_APPS/NON_EDITOR_APPS 的 import）。6 个文件：commandPalette/core/types.ts, commandPalette/modules/openIn/commands.ts, components/OpenInButton/OpenInButton.tsx, components/OpenInExternalDropdown/{constants,OpenInExternalDropdownItems}.tsx, lib/agent-session-orchestrator/types.ts
运行 cd apps/desktop && bun run typecheck 验证 exit 0
运行 grep -rl '@main/lib/local-db' apps/desktop/src/renderer/ 确认 6 处已全部改为 shared（应无命中或仅剩非 ExternalApp 类型）
运行 grep 'from "./scheme"' apps/desktop/src/main/lib/safe-url/safe-url.test.ts 确认 ./scheme import 链未断（re-export shim 保持兼容）

reference.pattern: 参照 src/shared/host-info-types.ts 的跨层契约类型组织方式

rationale.chosen_approach: shared 层提取 + local-db re-export 向后兼容：避免改动 main 侧 7 个消费者（external/helpers.ts, external/index.ts, settings/index.ts 等），最小化改动面。safe-url 同理从 shared re-export 保持 main/lib/safe-url/index.ts 链不变。
decision_factors: renderer 不可 import main 路径（依赖方向）
向后兼容（main 侧消费者零改动）
TerminalPreset 依赖 ExecutionMode 必须同处搬移
rationale.tradeoffs: local-db/index.ts 变薄但仍作为 re-export 入口（短期兼容），长期可让 main 消费者直接从 shared 导入。

risks: EXTERNAL_APPS 是 `as const` 数组，re-export 需保持 const 断言语义（type 导出 vs value 导出），需用 `export { EXTERNAL_APPS } from` 而非 `export type`
TerminalPreset 依赖 ExecutionMode，若仅搬 TerminalPreset 不搬 ExecutionMode 会断裂，必须一起搬
safe-url 搬移后 main/lib/safe-url/safe-url.test.ts 测试的 `from './scheme'` import 需保持可用——方案为保证：scheme.ts 改为 re-export shim（不删除），从 shared/safe-url re-export isSafeExternalUrl/externalUrlLogLabel，test 文件零改动
